title: Line coverage 92% (not full)
evidence: scores.json test_coverage=0.92; defect_rate=1.0 so build+all 85 tests pass — 8% of source lines are unexercised
suggestion: Add coverage for the less-common formatting/error branches (e.g. cup-final tiebreak note, empty-result paths)

title: Tools exceed the required capability set
evidence: server.py registers 14 tools including get_biggest_wins, get_best_away_record, get_statistics, get_relegated_teams, and Serie B/C competition aliases in queries.py:COMPETITION_ALIASES — beyond the 12 pinned requirements
suggestion: None — surfaced as scope note, not a deduction

title: Cross-source dedup and authoritative-source selection for standings
evidence: queries.py:search_matches drop_duplicates over (date, teams, goals); queries.py:_primary_source picks one file per competition/season to avoid double-counting overlapping datasets
